scripts.dev: concurrently -n server,client -c blue,green --kill-others-on-fail "npm run dev -w @kosh-central/server" "npm run dev -w @kosh-central/client"
scripts.build: npm run build -w @kosh-central/server && npm run build -w @kosh-central/client
scripts.deploy:image: az acr login --name koshcentralacr && docker build --build-arg GIT_SHA=$(git rev-parse --short HEAD) -t koshcentralacr.azurecr.io/kosh-central:latest -f Dockerfile . && docker push koshcentralacr.azurecr.io/kosh-central:latest
scripts.deploy:restart: az containerapp update --resource-group kosh-central-rg --name kosh-central --image koshcentralacr.azurecr.io/kosh-central:latest --revision-suffix v$(date +%Y%m%d%H%M%S)
scripts.deploy:container: npm run deploy:image && npm run deploy:restart
scripts.logs: az monitor log-analytics query -w 5478df0a-8927-4b09-877e-4e4aa76d32f7 --analytics-query "ContainerAppConsoleLogs_CL | where ContainerAppName_s == 'kosh-central' | order by TimeGenerated desc | take 100 | project TimeGenerated, Log_s | order by TimeGenerated asc" -o table
scripts.logs:live: az containerapp logs show --resource-group kosh-central-rg --name kosh-central --follow --tail 100
